title: TypeScript
description: CReact is written in TypeScript. Here's how to get the most out of the type system for signals, props, and components.
tsconfig_intro: The key setting is <0>jsxImportSource</0>. This tells TypeScript to use CReact's JSX types:
typed_signals_intro: Signals infer their type from the initial value, or you can specify it explicitly:
info_types: CReact re-exports key types: <0>Accessor</0>, <1>Setter</1>, <2>MaybeAccessor</2>, <3>SignalOptions</3>, <4>MemoOptions</4>, <5>Owner</5>, <6>Context</6>, and all runtime types.
